indications.text: WAKIX is a histamine-3 (H3) receptor antagonist/inverse agonist indicated for the: ___________________ ___________________
WAKIX is a histamine-3 (H3) receptor antagonist/inverse agonist indicated for the: ____________________ ___________________

WAKIX is indicated for the treatment of excessive daytime sleepiness (EDS) or cataplexy in adult
patients with narcolepsy.

WAKIX is indicated for the treatment of excessive daytime sleepiness (EDS) or cataplexy in adult
patients with narcolepsy.

WAKIX is indicated for the treatment of excessive daytime sleepiness (EDS) or cataplexy in patients
6 years of age and older with narcolepsy.
